risks.title: RedDirt Fallback Becomes Hidden Production Dependency
risks.mitigation: Disable filesystem fallback in Netlify and production contexts.

risks.title: Public Variable Misclassification
risks.mitigation: Separate schemas, bundle scanning, explicit allowlist.

risks.title: Secret Appears in Error or Log
risks.mitigation: Central error and logging sanitization.

risks.title: CSP Breaks Application Runtime
risks.mitigation: Staged CSP with unsafe-inline styles/scripts; nonce path later.

risks.title: In-Memory Rate Limiting Misrepresented
risks.mitigation: Labeled development-only / not distributed.

risks.title: Environment Status Reveals Infrastructure
risks.mitigation: Capability and broad target classification only.

risks.title: Database Diagnostic Leaks Host Information
risks.mitigation: Redact host and omit user/database names.

risks.title: Safe Redirect Bypass
risks.mitigation: Single redirect helper with tests.

risks.title: Error Handling Hides Operational Failures
risks.mitigation: Safe public responses + redacted server logs + request IDs.

risks.title: Security Foundation Mistaken for Full Security
risks.mitigation: candidate_data_ready false; auth incomplete warnings.

risks.title: Work Blocks Forgotten When Events Land
risks.mitigation: Standing availability policy encoded now; materialize in Steps 5–10.

risks.title: Subcalendars Become Siloed Apps
risks.mitigation: Federation constitution + shared event/permission/audit standards; one canonical event record.

risks.title: Command Calendar Noise Overload
risks.mitigation: Roll-up modes (BUSY_ONLY / MILESTONES_ONLY / DO_NOT_ROLL_UP) enforced at schema and UI.

risks.title: Limited Display Reveals Sensitive Details
risks.mitigation: Amended doctrine: AVAILABILITY_ONLY shows calendar name + safe title + general location + times only. Protected fields omitted server-side (ADR-033). Restricted titles and CITY location default.

risks.title: External Sync Overwrites Master
risks.mitigation: ADR-028 — external calendars never authoritative; retain origin + sync status.

risks.title: Hidden Events Cause Scheduling Confusion
risks.mitigation: ADR-029 — occupied time remains visible with calendar type, safe title, and general location.

risks.title: Browser Receives Protected Fields
risks.mitigation: ADR-033 — sanitize before client delivery; sanitization tests assert omitted keys.

risks.title: Exact Location Creates Security Exposure
risks.mitigation: ADR-032 — default CITY disclosure for limited viewers; HIDDEN for protected personal.

risks.title: Calendar Category Reveals Too Much
risks.mitigation: Sensitive calendars may use safe category names such as Protected Personal Time.

risks.title: Multiple Calendar Membership Leaks Strategy
risks.mitigation: ADR-035 — display only primary calendar unless additional memberships authorized.

risks.title: Users Mistake Limited Access for Missing Information
risks.mitigation: SafeEventBlock shows limited-access text notice while preserving scheduling context.

risks.title: Public Calendar Link Exposure
risks.mitigation: Redact identifiers; exclude from Git and status APIs; session-only URL handling.

risks.title: Duplicate Historical Events
risks.mitigation: Fingerprints, similarity detection, review queue, idempotent restage awareness.

risks.title: Recurring Event Explosion
risks.mitigation: Bounded ranges and recurrence expansion limits.

risks.title: Imported Event Mistaken for Confirmed Attendance
risks.mitigation: Review enrichment; no blind attendance claims.

risks.title: Incomplete Historical Catalogue
risks.mitigation: Disclose coverage, review counts, gaps, sync dates in future reports.

risks.title: Fast Form Becomes Overwhelming
risks.mitigation: Quick mode, progressive sections, templates.

risks.title: Checkbox Overload
risks.mitigation: Group checklists by phase; show subsets by default.

risks.title: AI Prefills Incorrect Information
risks.mitigation: AI disabled; suggestions evidence-based and uncommitted until selected.

risks.title: Planning Details Leak Through Limited View
risks.mitigation: Separate safe summaries from protected plan sections (visibility doctrine).

risks.title: Staging Files Enter Git
risks.mitigation: ingest_staging gitignore + validation gates.
